ext.description: Sidebar manager for VSCode's workbench.editorAssociations — see every installed custom editor (viewType + selectors), inspect current pattern → editor mappings, and add/remove mappings to Workspace or User settings.

runtime.No mappings configured. VSCode is using: No mappings configured. VSCode is using priority-based defaults.
runtime.Scope: writes the mapping to .vscode/set: Scope: writes the mapping to .vscode/settings.json in this workspace.
runtime.Scope: writes the mapping to your global: Scope: writes the mapping to your global user settings.
